assertions.title: Permission and disk errors

steps.observed: Both error variants defined at store.rs:62-67, PermissionDenied mapped from io::ErrorKind::PermissionDenied at store.rs:98-99

evidence.testResults: N/A - no automated test for actual permission/disk errors

assertions.issues: No automated test exists for permission denied or disk full scenarios. Error types implemented and display correctly. Full verification would require controlled filesystem permissions.

blockers.description: No automated tests for directory tree discovery (VAL-STORE-003) and global fallback (VAL-STORE-004). Implementation verified via source inspection but not executed.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified implementation logic through source code review at store.rs:141-159

blockers.description: No automated tests for permission denied and disk full error scenarios (VAL-STORE-013). Error types are implemented and displayed correctly.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified error type definitions and mapping through source inspection at store.rs:62-101

summary: Tested 13 store assertions: 10 passed, 3 blocked. All 38 store-specific unit tests pass. 3 assertions blocked due to lack of automated tests for filesystem scenarios (directory discovery, global fallback, permission/disk errors) that are difficult to automate but are correctly implemented per source inspection.
